shortDescription: A physics-based playground sandbox where you can build tracks and use 100+ blocks in big space worlds.

longdescription.content: Welcome to Marble Playground! This is a game about designing and building what ever you desire, weather it is racing, logic, color sorting or much more.
Inside our new logic update, you can wire up switches and make cool types of circuits.

longdescription.alt: Wiring up switches and controlling pathways

longdescription.content: Logic can almost effect all blocks by their scripts > setting active/deactive, passthrough/blocked, delay, timer, all logic gates. Currently only marbles can effect logic trigger blocks.
Racing marbles can be done in different ways. 1 way to do this is to set up checkpoint blocks with ids 1-max amount. Marbles have to passthrough each checkpoint in the right order.

If a marble skips a checkpoint ID and finishes the race it is still under DNF rules. If you want a section to repeat, you must Change the checkpoint options to use ResetID > (IDNumber), this can help different sections repeat and still continue to update who the leader is.

This is a examle of how the checkpoint block works, the marbles update once the next checkpoint is the finish > During a timed race the game gets the last CheckpointID as the finish ID (old UI system).
This next one is a example of the New Race UI, Shows the top 3 in Gold, Silver, Bronze, Rest positions use a single color.
Using the Grouping UI, you can create a new group and select objects to add to such a group. This allows you to quick select this group mvoe it around, copy and paste multiple objects at once.
In the 'V6 Update' Copying and pasting of logic groups works. the pasted blocks get new IDs and relink with the new IDs.
